title: Banach Contraction Principle Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process and conditions for a contraction mapping to converge to a unique fixed point in a complete metric space.
elements: Contraction Mapping T: X→X (with constant k<1)
relationships: T is a contraction mapping on the complete space
Sequence is generated by repeated application of T
Sequence is Cauchy and converges due to completeness
Limit is the unique fixed point x*
